name: Autobell Car Wash, Inc
message: Founded in 1969, Autobell Car Wash, Inc. is a conveyorized car wash company that offers interior and exterior wash options.Autobell Car Wash corporate office is located in 1521 E 3rd St, Charlotte, North Carolina, 28204, United States and has 584 employees.The total amount of data leakage is 183.3 GB
